raw_consumer_statement: XXXX incorrectly charged me for tariffs. I placed an order for a total of XXXX units with a total value of {$1400.00}. XXXX incorrectly notated the value of the product to be {$11000.00}. I should have been charged the tariff rate % against the total value of inventory I purchased ( {$1400.00} ) ; instead, I was charged the tariff rate against an incorrect inventory value of {$11000.00}. This meant an incorrect overpayment of {$620.00}. The purchase order and invoice I paid show the accurate value of the inventory. I tried to contact XXXX for a resolution over a dozen times. When I could not get through to XXXX for months, I then submitted a claim with CitiBank to get them to dispute the amount I was charged. They declined my dispute and are not allowing me to reopen the dispute for further investigation. I have done everything in my power to reach out to both XXXX and CitiBank to resolve the issue. They charged me an extra {$620.00} that I should not have been charged.
